rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical: same 6/10 score, identical justification, and the same three strengths and concerns with only trivial rewording ('Technical leadership' vs 'Technical leadership and mentoring', 'No explicit experience' vs 'No clear experience', 'preferred qualifications' vs 'job's technology stack'). None of these reworded differences key off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith, and they fall within ordinary run-to-run paraphrase noise.
